programs.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programs.sub_title: He's Low-Key Chopping Down a Tree
programs.desc: Amber and Emma surprise Liz with a bridal shower. Jonah and Alex help Brice get over his fear of public speaking. Trent cuts down a tree in the backyard, but concerns rise as he begins having heart palpitations. The family experiences a devastating loss.

programs.title: 1000-lb Roomies
programs.desc: California besties, Jaz and Nesha, are not your average roommates; at a combined 1000-lbs, they have big personalities and an even bigger appetite for life; but a sobering talk with a friend makes Jaz realize her life is on the line.

programs.title: 1000-lb Roomies
programs.desc: Larger-than-life roommates Nesha and Jazz tackle life, love and losing weight as they bond over food and their shared love of Jazz's daughter, Nana.

programs.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programs.desc: Comic and actor Ron Funches talks about his hit shows "The Traitors" and "Loot"; motivational speaker Alethea Crimmins talks about her upcoming affirmation deck, "Have a Good Day on Purpose: 52 Affirmation Cards from Ya' Hype Girl"; 11-year-old aspiring makeup artist Gio Dominguez, whose makeup tutorials online have attracted millions of views, gives a demonstration.

programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: Phil cannot handle the stress when he tells Claire an elaborate lie; Gloria is tasked with organizing this year's family portrait; Jay covertly enters Stella in a dog show.

programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge one another to try something new; Mitch and Cam sell a couple of their prized possessions to fund the wedding; the kids play a joke on Phil and Claire.
